nasb.text: I will set no worthless thing before my eyes; I hate the work of those who fall away; It shall not fasten its grip on me.

esv.text: I will not set before my eyes anything that is worthless. I hate the work of those who fall away; it shall not cling to me.

cnv.text: 邪惡的事，我都不擺在眼前； 離開正路的人所作的事，我都恨惡， 決不容這些沾染我。

ccb.text: 我要弃绝恶事， 我憎恶背弃上帝者的行为， 不沾染他们的恶行。

csbs.text: 卑劣的事，我不摆在眼前， 背道者所做的，我都恨恶，不容它沾我身。
